name: google-workspace-mcp
description: Local Google Workspace MCP server (Sheets + Drive) that runs privately on your machine over stdio. No SSL certificate and no internet tunnel required.
long_description: A self-contained MCP server for Google Sheets and Drive. Runs as a local process launched by Claude Desktop over stdio, so it needs no HTTPS/SSL and is never exposed to the network. Sign in once with your Google account; the encrypted refresh token is stored only on your machine.

google_client_id.title: Google Client ID
google_client_id.description: OAuth client ID (Web application type) from your Google Cloud project.

google_client_secret.title: Google Client Secret
google_client_secret.description: OAuth client secret paired with the client ID above.
